description_long: This is a modern, rectangular house with a flat roof and a minimalist design. The exterior is predominantly white with dark brown fencing and trim, and it features large, evenly spaced windows on both long sides. The house includes a driveway leading to a garage at the front, with a car parked in front of the garage. Both sides of the house are bordered by extended wooden fences, creating private outdoor spaces. The structure appears to have three stories, with the uppermost level set back slightly from the lower levels. The overall aesthetic is clean and geometric, with a focus on functional outdoor and indoor living spaces.
description: A modern, three-story white house with a flat roof, large windows, and dark brown fencing, featuring a driveway and garage at the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garage, and a car parked in front, with the main entrance area visible.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the long facade with multiple windows and the full length of the dark brown fence.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back patio area and the continuation of the fencing, with fewer windows visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the other long facade and the fenced outdoor area.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with a garage door, driveway, and minimal decorative elements
